Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows impaired fasting glucose, dyslipidemia with elevated total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Renal function and electrolytes are within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend further evaluation and management of glucose and lipid abnormalities.
